## beehiiv webhooks create

Create a webhook

### Synopsis

Create a webhook

Create a new webhook for a given publication.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/webhooks

```
beehiiv webhooks create [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv webhooks create --body @webhook.json
beehiiv hooks add --body '{"url":"https://example.com/webhook","event_types":["subscription.confirmed"]}'
```

### Options

```
      --body string         Provide a request body as inline JSON, @path, or - for stdin
  -h, --help                help for create
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```

      --api-key string          Override the Beehiiv API key
      --base-url string         Override the API base URL

      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
      --raw                     Shorthand for --output raw

      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
